languages.text: {n}Батошски оскаливается. Вопреки ожиданию, в его ухмылке чувствуется уважение. Как у зверя, встретившего другого хищника.{/n} "Потому что я хочу передать вам полк согласно всем традициям. Потому что это правильно. И потому что я не готов оскорбить вас жалостью или пренебрежением".
languages.translation_comment: Если играют этюды DW_CombatTechnique, DW_VenomResistance и DW_IzhdrigWeakness
Если играют этюды DW_CombatTechnique, DW_VenomResistance и DW_IzhdrigWeakness

languages.text: {n}Batoshski bares his teeth. Unexpectedly, there is respect in his smile, but it is that of a beast that has met another predator.{/n} "Because I wish to hand over the regiment to you following every tradition. Because it is the right thing to do. And because I refuse to insult you with pity or disdain."
languages.original_text: {n}Батошски оскаливается. Вопреки ожиданию, в его ухмылке чувствуется уважение. Как у зверя, встретившего другого хищника.{/n} "Потому что я хочу передать вам полк согласно всем традициям. Потому что это правильно. И потому что я не готов оскорбить вас жалостью или пренебрежением".

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski bares his teeth. Contrary to expectations, there is respect in his grin. It is the look of a beast that has met another predator.{/n} "Because I wish to hand over the regiment to you following every tradition. Because it's the right thing to do. And because I refuse to insult you with pity or disdain."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基龇牙一笑。出乎意料的是，那笑容里竟带着几分敬意，就像一头猛兽终于遇见了另一个同类。{/n}“因为我想用传统的方式把这个军团交到您手上，因为这是正确的做法，还因为我不愿用怜悯或轻蔑来侮辱您。”
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski bares his teeth. Unexpectedly, there is respect in his smile, but it is that of a beast that has met another predator.{/n} "Because I wish to hand over the regiment to you following every tradition. Because it is the right thing to do. And because I refuse to insult you with pity or disdain."

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基龇牙一笑。出乎意料的是，那笑容里竟带着几分敬意，就像一头猛兽终于遇见了另一个同类。{/n}“因为我想用传统的方式把这个军团交到您手上，因为这是正确的做法，还因为我不愿用怜悯或轻蔑来侮辱您。”

languages.text: {n}Batoshski dişlerini gösteriyor. Gülümsemesi, beklenmedik bir saygı içerse de aslında başka bir avcıyla karşı karşıya kalmış bir hayvanınkinden farksız.{/n} "Çünkü alayı size tüm geleneklere uygun şekilde teslim etmek istiyorum. Çünkü doğru olan bu. Size acıyarak ya da küçümseyerek hakaret etmeyi reddediyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski bares his teeth. Unexpectedly, there is respect in his smile, but it is that of a beast that has met another predator.{/n} "Because I wish to hand over the regiment to you following every tradition. Because it is the right thing to do. And because I refuse to insult you with pity or disdain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski dişlerini gösteriyor. Gülümsemesi, beklenmedik bir saygı içerse de aslında başka bir avcıyla karşı karşıya kalmış bir hayvanınkinden farksız.{/n} "Çünkü alayı size tüm geleneklere uygun şekilde teslim etmek istiyorum. Çünkü doğru olan bu. Size acıyarak ya da küçümseyerek hakaret etmeyi reddediyorum."

languages.text: {n}La bouche de Batoshski s'étire en un rictus carnassier. Son sourire est étonnamment déférent, à la manière d'un prédateur croisant son égal.{/n} « Car je souhaite vous confier le régiment conformément à la plus pure tradition. Il doit en être ainsi. Et aussi, car je refuse de vous avilir par ma pitié ou ma condescendance. »
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski bares his teeth. Unexpectedly, there is respect in his smile, but it is that of a beast that has met another predator.{/n} "Because I wish to hand over the regiment to you following every tradition. Because it is the right thing to do. And because I refuse to insult you with pity or disdain."

traits.locale_text: {n}La bouche de Batoshski s'étire en un rictus carnassier. Son sourire est étonnamment déférent, à la manière d'un prédateur croisant son égal.{/n} « Car je souhaite vous confier le régiment conformément à la plus pure tradition. Il doit en être ainsi. Et aussi, car je refuse de vous avilir par ma pitié ou ma condescendance. »

languages.text: {n}Batoshski enseña los dientes. Sorprendentemente, hay respeto en su sonrisa, pero solo el de una bestia que se ha encontrado con otro depredador.{/n} «Porque quiero entregarle el regimiento de acuerdo con la tradición. Porque es lo correcto. Y porque me niego a insultarl{mf|e|a} con lástima ni desdén».
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski bares his teeth. Unexpectedly, there is respect in his smile, but it is that of a beast that has met another predator.{/n} "Because I wish to hand over the regiment to you following every tradition. Because it is the right thing to do. And because I refuse to insult you with pity or disdain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski enseña los dientes. Sorprendentemente, hay respeto en su sonrisa, pero solo el de una bestia que se ha encontrado con otro depredador.{/n} «Porque quiero entregarle el regimiento de acuerdo con la tradición. Porque es lo correcto. Y porque me niego a insultarl{mf|e|a} con lástima ni desdén».

languages.text: {n}Batoshski fletscht seine Zähne. Sein Lächeln ist unerwartet respektvoll, gleicht aber dem eines wilden Tieres.{/n} "Weil ich Euch das Regiment übergeben möchte, wie es die Tradition verlangt. Weil es das Richtige ist. Und weil ich Euch nicht mit Mitleid oder Geringschätzung beleidigen will."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski bares his teeth. Unexpectedly, there is respect in his smile, but it is that of a beast that has met another predator.{/n} "Because I wish to hand over the regiment to you following every tradition. Because it is the right thing to do. And because I refuse to insult you with pity or disdain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski fletscht seine Zähne. Sein Lächeln ist unerwartet respektvoll, gleicht aber dem eines wilden Tieres.{/n} "Weil ich Euch das Regiment übergeben möchte, wie es die Tradition verlangt. Weil es das Richtige ist. Und weil ich Euch nicht mit Mitleid oder Geringschätzung beleidigen will.

languages.text: {n}バトシュスキーは牙を剥いた。しかし、その笑顔には意外な敬意が宿っていた。それは、同じ捕食者と出会った野獣の敬意だった。{/n}「私は、全ての伝統に従って、この連隊をあなたに引き継ぎたい。それは正しいことだから。そして、あなたを哀れみや軽蔑で侮辱したくはないから。」
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski bares his teeth. Unexpectedly, there is respect in his smile, but it is that of a beast that has met another predator.{/n} "Because I wish to hand over the regiment to you following every tradition. Because it is the right thing to do. And because I refuse to insult you with pity or disdain."
